name: @brusdeylins/pptc
description: Deterministic PowerPoint (PPTX) CLI for LLM agents: template-aware creation and editing with atomic, schema-validated operations
author: Matthias Brusdeylins <brusdeylins@gmx.de>

scripts.plugin:sync: npm run build && cp dst/pptc.mjs plugin/skills/powerpoint/scripts/pptc.mjs && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('plugin/skills/powerpoint/scripts/VERSION', require('./package.json').version + '\n')"
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
